name: Duomo Pavement Medallion
prompt: Top-down orthographic view of the great marble pavement of Santa Maria del Fiore cathedral, Florence: a large central circular rosette medallion with concentric rings of geometric marble inlay - alternating small circles, squares and radiating spoke segments around a small dark porphyry center disc. Four broad diagonal star-points extend from the circle toward the corners forming a square-in-diamond composition. Surrounding rectangular border panels of alternating geometric marble inlay frames. Materials: cream-white Carrara marble, dark grey-black marble, soft rose-pink marble, deep red porphyry accents. Renaissance opus sectile stone marquetry, aged polished cathedral floor. Perfectly square composition filling the entire frame edge to edge, no border cropping, even flat lighting, no shadows, no people, no railings, no photo artifacts, no text, no watermark.

name: Duomo Walkway Tile
prompt: Seamless repeating marble floor pattern from the nave walkway of Santa Maria del Fiore cathedral, Florence: large circles inscribed in squares, each circle made of concentric black and white marble ring bands around a big central disc of deep red-brown porphyry stone. Small circular rosette medallions at the grid intersections between squares. Field of warm white Carrara marble with thin black marble border strips forming the square grid. Renaissance opus sectile stone marquetry, aged polished cathedral pavement. Top-down flat orthographic view, perfectly seamless repeating texture that tiles edge to edge with no visible seam, one full circle module centered in frame. Even flat lighting, no shadows, no vignette, no perspective, fills entire frame, no text, no watermark.

name: Duomo Wall Plaster
prompt: Seamless texture of aged warm white cathedral interior wall, smooth ivory-cream lime plaster over stone with very subtle tonal variation, faint soft mottling and gentle age patina, barely visible fine hairline cracks, medieval Italian church interior wall surface. Plain and quiet surface, NO pattern, NO ornament, NO bricks, NO visible stone blocks. Top-down flat orthographic view, perfectly seamless repeating texture tiling edge to edge with no visible seam. Even flat lighting, no shadows, no vignette, fills entire frame, no text, no watermark. Warm ivory and cream tones only, no cool grey.

name: Painting Dante Inferno
prompt: An ornate Renaissance framed painting: Dante Alighieri standing in red robes and laurel crown holding his open Divine Comedy, gesturing toward the circles of Hell burning behind him, Florence cathedral skyline on the other side, in the style of Domenico di Michelino 1465 tempera. Heavy carved gilded gold wood frame with acanthus leaf ornament. Straight-on front view, the entire framed painting as a single object, isolated on a plain white background, soft even studio lighting, no shadows on background, no text, no captions, no watermark.

name: Duomo Compound Pier
